subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Covenant of God! According to reports, in that region and other parts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الخادمان لمیثاق الله از قرار اخبار در آن نقطه و سائر نقاط در بین
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
